Name: pulseWidth1
Description: Injector 1 pulse width (also expressible as 0.666 us/LSB raw)

Name: squirt
Description: Injection event status bitfield (see firing1..inj2 below)

Name: ready
Description: Engine initialised and ready to run

Name: wbo2_en1
Description: Wideband O2 bank 1 measurement valid flag

Name: wbo2_en2
Description: Wideband O2 bank 2 measurement valid flag

Name: mat
Adder: Manifold (intake) air temp. CELSIUS firmware: factor 0.05555 adder -320; Fahrenheit firmware: factor 0.100 adder 0

Name: coolant
Adder: Coolant / cylinder-head temperature (CHT). Same scaling caveat as mat

Name: idleDC
Adder: Idle PWM duty (same offset as iacstep aliased)

Name: fuelload
Adder: Effective load used in fuel-table lookup (units depend on `algorithm` config: kPa / %baro / %TPS / MAFload / ITB)

Name: portStatus
Description: Spare GPIO port status bitfield (see port0..port6)

Name: looptime
Adder: Main control-loop iteration time (ECU health indicator)

Name: fuelload2
Adder: Secondary fuel-table load (when dual-table fuel enabled)

Name: deltaT
Adder: Normalized time between trigger pulses (EDIS only)

Name: gpiopwmin0
Adder: Generic-IO PWM input 0 (frequency or duty counts)

Name: adc6
Adder: Extra ADC input 6 — wired for EGT probe 1. EGT in degC = adc6 * 1.222 (1250 degC K-type) or adc6 * 0.956 (1000 degC K-type)

Name: adc7
Adder: Extra ADC input 7 — wired for EGT probe 2. Same conversion as adc6

Name: syncreason
Adder: Code identifying the reason for the last loss of sync

Name: maf
Adder: Mass airflow rate (if MAF sensor wired). Factor depends on maf_range config: 650/1300/1950/2600 g/s ranges

Name: RPMdot
Adder: Rate of change of engine speed

Name: airtemp
Adder: Independent air-temperature sensor (separate from mat). CELSIUS firmware vs Fahrenheit firmware scaling

Name: ext_advance
Adder: External advance input (e.g. from auxiliary controller)

Name: base_advance
Adder: Base ignition advance from the spark table lookup

Name: cycleTime1
Description: Time for one full injection cycle bank 1 (60000 / rpm * (2 - twoStroke))

Name: cycleTime2
Description: Time for one full injection cycle bank 2

Name: nSquirts1
Description: Injection events per cycle bank 1 (nCylinders / divider)

Name: dutyCycle1
Description: Injector 1 duty cycle (100 * nSquirts1 / altDiv1 * pulseWidth1 / cycleTime1)

Name: boostvac
Description: vacuum if below atmospheric else boostpsig

Name: egoVoltage
Description: egoV / lambda1 / afr1 depending on firmware build (NARROW_BAND_EGO / LAMBDA / default)

Name: egt6temp
Description: EGT probe 1: adc6 * 1.222 (1250C K-type) or adc6 * 0.956 (1000C K-type) or Fahrenheit equivalent

Name: egt7temp
Description: EGT probe 2: same conversion as egt6temp

Name: calcflow
Description: Synthetic mass airflow = fuelload * rpm * veCurr1 / 100

Name: maxFuel
Description: Max possible fuel flow at 100% duty = (staged_pri_size/1000) * nCylinders * 60

Name: fuelFlow
Description: Actual fuel flow estimate (computed from PW * RPM * cylinders * injector flow rate)

Name: accEnrichMS
Description: Acceleration enrichment in ms (alias for accelEnrich)
